title: 1399 Nostrand

**PULL UP TO LITTLE CARIBBEAN'S DUTY FREE IN NYC'S COOLEST NABE!**

**COME FOR DI CULTURE, STAY FOR DI VIBES!**


# 1399 Nostrand

**Flagship**

**Nestled in the heart of Little Caribbean, I AM CARIBBEING’s HQ located @1399 Nostrand was created as a tribute to the neighborhood where we were born and raised, Flatbush.  Inspired by _Caribpolitan_ lifestyle and heritage, we hope this space will help us develop an even deeper connection with the community that inspired it.  A place to lime, feel at home and be inspired.**

**Step in where you will find a  thoughtfully curated selection of everyday _tings_ from Back Home aka the Caribbean (blue soap, enamel cups), as well as products from some of local makers, vintage wares & more. The space @1399 will also serve as a gallery for emerging artists, our work atelier and Mas Camp leading up to the West Indian Day Parade.**

## Creative Third Spaces Rooted in Caribpolitan Culture

I AM CARIBBEING offers distinctive, community-centered venues—including Caribbeing House (our mobile shipping container), our HQ storefront in Little Caribbean, Brooklyn, and our Governors Island location—designed for culture, creativity, and connection.

Built as Third Spaces, our environments host meaningful gatherings of all kinds: author talks, film screenings, community conversations, product launches, workshops, food and rum tastings, birthday celebrations, and team-building experiences. Each space is thoughtfully designed to bring people together through culture and storytelling.

Book your next experience: hello@caribbeing.com

title: Mission
body:
This store requires javascript to be enabled for some features to work correctly.

**PULL UP TO LITTLE CARIBBEAN'S DUTY FREE IN NYC'S COOLEST NABE!**

**COME FOR DI CULTURE, STAY FOR DI VIBES!**


# Mission

[**I AM CARIBBEING**](https://www.caribbeing.com/) **is a thriving cultural organization that stands at the crossroads of film + art + culture. Based in Flatbush, Brooklyn AKA Little Caribbean, I AM CARIBBEING spans contemporary culture and is a hub for creativity and collaborations with some of the Caribbean’s most visionary talent and innovative brands.**

**Now in its 11th year, I AM CARIBBEING has grown into a global movement.**

**Handcrafted here and back home I AM CARIBBEING curates unique + unconventional collections for those who crave authenticity + cultural relevance + who support local ideas and makers.**

**What started off as an experiment, transformed into a collection of beautiful things that you can wear + utilize + incorporate in everyday life.**

**MADE IN BROOKLYN. 100% CARIBBEAN. BLACK OWNED.**

**COME FOR DI CULTURE, STAY FOR DI VIBES!**


# FAQs

### **Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)**

**Q: When will my order ship?**

**A:** If your product is in stock, your order will ship within **3–5 business days** from your order date.

* * *

**Q: Do you accept returns?**

**A:** We do not accept returns unless the product was **damaged or defective** upon receipt.

* * *

**Q: Can I exchange my order?**

**A:** Exchanges are considered **on a case-by-case basis**. Reach out and we’ll do our best to accommodate you.

* * *

**Q: How can I get in touch with someone about my order?**

**A:** Email us at shop@caribbeing.com.

For a more immediate response, contact hello@caribbeing.com.

* * *

**Q: When will this item be back in stock?**

**A:** We produce in **small batches**, so restocks may take a little time. Once an item is restocked, we typically ship it within **2–3 business days**.

Thank you for your **patience, understanding, and for supporting a BLACK-OWNED BUSINESS.**

* * *

**Q: I can’t wait — I need my product NOW!**

**A:** If your order hasn’t shipped yet, we’re happy to issue a **full refund**. Just email shop@caribbeing.com.

Prefer a swap? Ask us about a **substitution**, like the same item in a different color or style.

As we say in the Caribbean, **“Patience is virtue and virtue is grace.”**
